info.title: Harness NextGen Software Delivery Platform API Reference
info.description: This is the Open Api Spec 3 for the NextGen Manager. This is under active development. Beware of the breaking change with respect to the generated code stub

get.description: Retrieve the information of the Organizations.

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching with search term.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items in each page

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.

get.description: Retrieve the information of the organization with the matching organization identifier.

put.description: Update the information of the organization with the matching organization identifier.

delete.description: Delete the information of the organization with the matching organization identifier.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organization the resource is scoped to

get.description: Retrieves the information of the Projects.

parameters.name: has_module
parameters.description: This boolean specifies whether to Filter Projects which has the Module of type passed in the moduleType parameter or not

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching with search term.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items in each page

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.Link

get.description: Retrieve the information of the Project with the matching Project identifier.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organization the resource is scoped to

put.description: Updates the information of the Project with the matching Project identifier.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organization the resource is scoped to

delete.description: Deletes the information of the Project with the matching Project identifier.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organization the resource is scoped to

last_modified_at.description: Last modification timestamp for the project

harness_managed.description: This indicates if this Organization is managed by Harness or not. If True, Harness can manage and modify this Organization.
